meaning: adj.<澳新俚>完全不讲章法的,混乱的,无组织的
examples: Ronan Rafferty had tied with Frank Nobilo.
Rafferty was the sole survivor from the successful Ireland team of 1988.
Mrs. O'Donovan was walking down O'Connell Street in Dublin, and coming in the opposite direction was Father Rafferty.
Rafferty, who was 16 when he was arrested, was too young to face execution.
His teenage accomplice, Brogan Rafferty, was sentenced to life in prison without parole in November.
